raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_2 (light brown) is resting on top of box_1 with its left and right faces unobstructed. Sufficient lateral clearance (≈10 cm per side) exists for both arms to approach simultaneously without colliding with surrounding objects or the tabletop edge.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is securely supported between the two end-effectors and lifted slightly above box_1, freeing the top face of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "clear table area right of box_1",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding box_2 and a clear 35 cm × 35 cm region on the tabletop to the right of box_1 is free of obstacles, allowing a vertical descent without collision.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is placed flat on the cleared region of the table, no longer supported by the robot. The top of box_1 is now fully accessible."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1’s left and right faces remain clear after removal of box_2. Adequate space exists for both arms to approach laterally without interference from the table edge or nearby objects.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 (dark brown) is firmly held between the two end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop, accomplishing the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2 (light brown) is resting on top of box_1 with its left and right faces unobstructed. Sufficient lateral clearance (≈10 cm per side) exists for both arms to approach simultaneously without colliding with surrounding objects or the tabletop edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is securely supported between the two end-effectors and lifted slightly above box_1, freeing the top face of box_1.

parsed_json.Target: clear table area right of box_1
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding box_2 and a clear 35 cm × 35 cm region on the tabletop to the right of box_1 is free of obstacles, allowing a vertical descent without collision.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is placed flat on the cleared region of the table, no longer supported by the robot. The top of box_1 is now fully accessible.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1’s left and right faces remain clear after removal of box_2. Adequate space exists for both arms to approach laterally without interference from the table edge or nearby objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 (dark brown) is firmly held between the two end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop, accomplishing the task of picking up the darker box.
